name: ciguard
summary: Static security auditor for CI/CD pipelines — now with a Model Context Protocol server (`pip install 'ciguard[mcp]'`) exposing scan / scan_repo / explain_rule / diff_baseline / list_rules to Claude Desktop / Claude Code / Cursor. Plus .ciguardignore rationale-required suppression, baseline / delta reports, EOL-aware image checks, GitHub Actions CVE lookups across GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, and Jenkins Pipelines. Pre-commit hook + CIGUARD_MCP_DISABLED enterprise gate.
author: Jo-Jo98
